previousDayImpact: Argentina's semifinal victory provided a massive 27-point boost to Team Jordan, Team Camouflage Cndm, Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, and Team koyn, creating a clear separation from the rest of the pack.
The loss for England resulted in only a marginal 1-point gain for Team Choo Choo, failing to help them keep pace with the leaders.
leaderboardSummary: Team Jordan has surged into the lead, climbing one spot to overtake Team Mack.
Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and Team koyn both jumped two places in the rankings following their successful Argentina pick.
Team Mack fell four spots to fifth place as they did not benefit from the semifinal scoring.
leverageWatch: The slate has no direct contest implications as there are no matches scheduled for today.
